steps.title: Use the final inference
steps.content: Panama City respondents reported higher park use even though fewer lived within a 10-minute walk of a park. The text concludes that proximity alone cannot explain the difference.

steps.title: Reject unsupported causes
steps.content: A mentions researcher expectations, B suggests survey inaccuracies, and C mentions older sources; none appears in the passage. The difference must be explained by something besides park proximity. The answer is D.
